brand_identity.name: Kandengue Marketplace
brand_identity.ethos: Organized Chaos. Vibrant, energetic, trustworthy, and distinctly Angolan.
brand_identity.emotional_tone: Energetic but reliable. Like a busy Luanda market that always has what you need.

headings.usage: Use for H1, H2, and major callouts. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraph text, labels, and inputs. Normal tracking.

mono.usage: Use for transaction IDs, price breakdowns, and code snippets.

primary.name: Angola Red
primary.usage: Primary buttons, sale tags, urgent notifications, active states.

secondary.name: Kizomba Yellow
secondary.usage: Highlights, secondary buttons, 'star' ratings, accent icons.

accent.name: Luanda Night
accent.usage: Footer, dark mode backgrounds, strong headings, borders.

layout_strategies.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-lg text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

Card.base: rounded-xl border border-black/5 bg-white text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#D62828] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. MOBILE-FIRST: Build the entire layout assuming a mobile device. Use 'max-w-md mx-auto' on the main container to simulate a phone screen on desktop.
2. ANGOLAN VIBE: Use the Red/Yellow/Black palette boldly. Do not revert to blue/gray SaaS defaults.
3. TAXI MODULE: Implement a 'Comparison Card' that shows price differences between providers (e.g., 'Yango', 'Heetch', 'Ugo'). Use the 'map_placeholder' image as a background for the tracking screen.
4. FOOD MODULE: Use horizontal scrolling lists for 'Categories' and vertical lists for 'Restaurants'.
5. AUTHENTICATION: Create a clean login screen with Google OAuth button and Email/Password fields. Use the Luanda Skyline as a subtle background.
6. PAYMENTS: Add visual toggles/radios for 'Multicaixa Express', 'Unitel Money', and 'BAI Paga'.
7. NAVIGATION: Use a fixed bottom navigation bar with icons for Home, Rides, Food, Wallet, Profile.
8. ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and button taps. Slide-in from bottom for modals.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
